supporting_evidence: R900008 invoice_no=FPDEV900008, vendor=开发供应商08, employee=E9001, usage_count=1
R900009 invoice_no=FPDEV900009, vendor=开发供应商09, employee=E9002, usage_count=1
find_invoice_usage confirms each invoice used exactly once
Policy 第十条 defines duplicate reimbursement as same invoice appearing in multiple claims
opposing_evidence: R900008 and R900009 share same date (2025-05-05), same amount (590), same expense_type (office_supplies) - these are coincidental similarities, not proof of duplicate
exceptions_or_boundaries: No threshold boundary issue; invoice identity is binary (same/different)
rationale: The no-anomaly conclusion passes the false-positive challenge. The two records use demonstrably different invoices (FPDEV900008 vs FPDEV900009), each with usage_count=1. The policy 第十条 explicitly ties duplicate reimbursement to the same invoice being used multiple times. Same day, same amount, same expense type, same department are coincidental surface similarities that do not override the invoice-level evidence. Different employees and different vendors further confirm independent transactions.
